_comment: Implementation-blind expected labels for the sleep-quality eval. Hand-derived from the fixture by reasoning about the documented invariants, NOT by running the code. epoch = 2026-06-10T12:00:00.000Z.

epochSafety._comment: applyConsolidation(state, epoch): survivors = sessions stopped strictly AFTER epoch (newest-first order preserved). Pre-epoch + null-stopped are processed/dropped.

debtCorrectness._comment: debt recomputed from survivors: s-post-1 (3) + s-post-2 (1) = 4. NOT a hardcoded 0.

noDoubleCount._comment: Re-stop the same session_id (score 3 then 1). Old score subtracted before new added.

attribution._comment: attributeByPerson over the 2-author commit list + roster. Bots (github-actions/dependabot) filtered. Bucketed newest-listed order = insertion order.

attributionControl._comment: Single-person roster. No phantom buckets; bots dropped.

triggerExpiry._comment: Triggers with fired_count >= max_fires expire on consolidation.

substanceScoring._comment: s-dense: change_count 0, tool_count 5. BEFORE = max(change,tool) = 1. AFTER = max(change,tool,substance) where substance signals are all met → 3.

depthGating._comment: isDestructiveAllowed by depth. BEFORE = destructive always allowed (no gating existed). AFTER = true only at deep.
